# UC-12.2.29 · Argo CD Repo Server TLS or Git Fetch Errors

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Availability, Fault &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.*

---

## Description

Git credential or TLS issues block manifest generation for many applications at once.

## Value

Detects upstream Git access failures before widespread `Unknown` sync states appear.

## Implementation

Enable structured logging on repo-server; extract `level`, `msg`, `repo`. Page when error rate doubles baseline.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:server"
| search "rpc error" OR "authentication required" OR "x509" OR "certificate" OR "repository"
| rex field=msg "repository[\"']?(?<repo>[^\"'\s]+)"
| stats count by repo, host
| where count>=10
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (errors by repo), Line chart (error rate).

## Known False Positives

Pipeline noise during blue/green cutovers, dependency cache cold-starts, or scheduled maintenance windows.

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
- [Splunk Infrastructure Monitoring App for Argo CD (GitHub)](https://github.com/splunk/Splunk-Infrastructure-Monitoring-App-for-ArgoCD)
